subject: Action Items from Team Offsite Kickoff
content:
Hi Hank,

I had a call with Pinnacle Analytics today about the Notification Hub
integration. Key takeaways:

- They can deliver the alpha phase by 9/1, which is 5 weeks behind our
schedule
- Pricing: $463K for the base package + $72K for Zero Trust Architecture
add-on
- They require a 1-year commitment minimum
- Technical contact will be Nate Thomas (DevOps Engineer)

For comparison, StreamLine Solutions quoted $516K with a more flexible
contract.

Should we bring this to the Board Meeting for a final decision?

Best,
Priya

subject: Re: Action Items from Team Offsite Kickoff
content:
All,

Following up from the All-Hands earlier today. Here are the action items:

- @Irene: Finalize the proposal by Thursday (target: 7/11)
- @Irene: Schedule the GraphQL Migration review with Engineering
- @Eve: Update the Auth Service configuration per our discussion
- @Priya: Send out the revised Project Apex timeline by EOW

Next meeting: Thursday at 14:30. Calendar invite to follow.

Thanks everyone,
Priya

subject: Re: Action Items from Team Offsite Kickoff
content:
Hi Grace,

Just a heads up — the Legacy CRM deployment (v8.0.26) is scheduled for
Tuesday at 11:30 GMT. Expected downtime is approximately 30 minutes.

Changes include:
- PR #374: Remove authentication flow
- PR #376: Aurora feature flag rollout
- Config update for APAC region

Please make sure your team is aware and has saved any in-progress work.
We'll send a notification to #product once complete.

Thanks,
Eve
